results.title: Jillean Griffin
highlights:
I’ve spent 15 years at the intersection of data and people, helping businesses understand who their customers are, where they shop, and why they choose one location over another. What started as a GIS and spatial analytics career evolved into leading national market research, consumer insights, and advertising programs for one of the largest shopping center REITs in the country. At Regency Centers I build and run a national mobile and CTV advertising program across 25 branded properties, manage $170K+ in annual media budget, and serve as the internal expert for location intelligence platforms including Placer.ai and Spatial.ai. I develop consumer personas, build pillar-based content strategies, and help merchants and tenants understand their customer so they can make smarter decisions about their locations and marketing. My research supports leasing, acquisitions, and site selection across 480+ properties nationally. In addition to my corporate role, I acquired and currently operate Ellie’s Party Supply, a multi-channel ecommerce brand with 200+ active wholesale accounts on Faire, selling across Shopify, Etsy, and Walmart Marketplace. Prior to that I co-founded The Gilded Shell, a coastal home decor brand I scaled to 200+ B2B wholesale accounts across the U.S. and internationally, successfully selling the business in 2025. Building and operating real businesses alongside a full-time career has sharpened my instincts as a strategist, operator, and relationship builder in ways that a corporate role alone never could. I’m passionate about the space where consumer data meets real business decisions. Whether that’s helping a retailer understand their trade area, building a marketing program that drives measurable foot traffic, or helping a wholesale merchant find their customer, I believe the best outcomes happen when data and relationships work together. I’m always open to connecting with people working at the intersection of insights, marketing, and client strategy. Feel free to reach out
...
Leading national market research, consumer insights, and advertising programs for one of the largest grocery-anchored shopping center REITs in the U.S. ∙Own a national continuity media program across mobile and CTV supporting 25 branded properties, managing $170K+ annual budget across planning, vendor oversight, creative coordination, campaign execution, and foot traffic attribution reporting. ∙Develop B2C and B2B consumer personas and content strategies that help merchants, tenants, and prospective retailers understand their customer and identify location fit. ∙Deliver consumer insights including trade area analysis, demographic profiling, psychographic segmentation, and competitive intelligence supporting leasing, acquisitions, and site selection across 480+ properties nationally. ∙Serve as subject matter expert and platform trainer for Placer.ai and Spatial.ai, onboarding and coaching 50+ leasing agents and market officers nationwide.

results.title: Asif Makda
highlights:
Sr Manager Data Platform at Regency Centers
...
Sr Manager Data Platform at [Regency Centers](https://www.linkedin.com/company/regency-centers)
...
As a Senior Manager of Data Platforms at Regency Centers, I bring a unique blend of expertise from dual careers in Accounting and Data Management, complemented by my CPA certification. With over 25 years of experience, I lead the design and optimization of enterprise data solutions that empower business intelligence and strategic decision-making while leveraging deep financial acumen to align data initiatives with organizational and fiscal goals. My background spans data architecture, application development, project management, and accounting, enabling me to bridge the gap between technical and financial disciplines. I specialize in building scalable, secure data platforms and fostering data governance and quality assurance to drive operational efficiency and data-driven cultures. Holding a Master of Science in Business Information Technology and a Bachelor of Science in Accounting from University of Texas at Dallas, I am committed to continuous learning and staying at the forefront of emerging data technologies. Passionate about leading cross-functional teams, I thrive on collaboration and delivering innovative data solutions that support business growth and transformation.
...
#### Sr Manager Data Platform (Current)
...
Strategic and results-driven Senior Manager specializing in Data Platform management, with extensive experience leading the design, development, and optimization of scalable data infrastructures that empower enterprise-wide analytics and business intelligence initiatives. I excel at building and managing high-performing teams responsible for architecting robust data platforms—leveraging cloud technologies, and modern data engineering practices. My focus lies in ensuring data accessibility, reliability, security, and governance, enabling organizations to harness data as a strategic asset. With a strong background in data architecture, ETL/ELT pipelines, data warehousing, and platform modernization, I drive initiatives that improve data quality, streamline data workflows, and accelerate time-to-insight. I partner closely with cross-functional stakeholders to translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions that support analytics. Passionate about innovation, operational excellence, and team development, I am committed to advancing data capabilities that unlock actionable insights and drive informed decision-making at all levels of the organization. results.title: Backend AI-Forward Data Engineer | Remotepulse
highlights:
Backend AI-Forward Data Engineer | Remotepulse
...
# Backend AI-Forward Data Engineer
...
- Greystar’s D2AI team is responsible for the platforms, processes, and practices that power AI across the organization. This role goes beyond traditional delivery—your decisions influence how data is transformed into intelligent, scalable solutions used by teams company‑wide. We require AI fluency because this role sits at the intersection of data, technology, and business outcomes. That means understanding how AI systems are designed and operationalized, using AI‑enabled tools in day‑to‑day work, and partnering effectively with engineering, analytics, and business teams to ensure AI solutions are reliable, responsible, and impactful.
...
Greystar is building the data foundation that will power the most AI-advanced operator in global multifamily real estate. We’re seeking a Backend AI-Forward Data Engineer to design, build, and operate the core data infrastructure that enables AI-powered products, analytics, and decision-making across a multi-billion dollar global portfolio.
...
This role sits at the intersection of data engineering and applied AI — you’ll build the pipelines, platforms, and interfaces that make Greystar’s proprietary data accessible, trustworthy, and AI-ready. You will work across our Data Management Platform (DMP), MCP integrations, and AI-enabled analytics tools that serve every business unit. Our team includes engineers, designers, and product leaders with experience from Google, Microsoft, Airbnb, Strava, Amazon, and more.
...
- Build and Scale AI-Ready Data Infrastructure
...
- Develop and operate our Data Management Platform (DMP) on Databricks, ensuring data is governed, validated, and available for AI/ML workloads.
...
- Build data models optimized for both analytical queries and AI consumption — including feature stores, embedding pipelines, and real-time serving layers.
...
- Enable AI and MCP Integrations
...
- Build and maintain MCP (Model Context Protocol) server integrations that expose Greystar’s data to LLM-powered tools and AI agents across the organization.
...
- Design APIs and data interfaces that allow AI products (GPS, Greystar.com, internal tools) to query and act on data in real time.
...
- Partner with Data Science and Product teams to operationalize ML models — building the infrastructure for model training, evaluation, deployment, and monitoring.
...
- Evaluate and integrate AI-powered data tooling (e.g., AI-assisted data cataloging, automated schema detection, intelligent data quality monitoring).
...
- Collaborate with other engineers on AI integration patterns, prompt engineering, and modern development practices. We are an AI forward team and it’s moving fast so we test, iterate, share and repeat.
...
- Strong SQL skills and experience with data modeling for both analytical (star schema, data vault) and AI/ML workloads.
...
- Deep experience with AI coding tools like Cursor, Codex, Claude Code, etc.
...
- AI/ML Data Infrastructure
...
- Experience building data infrastructure that supports ML workflows: feature stores, training pipelines, embedding generation, and model serving.
...
- Familiarity with LLM integration patterns including RAG architectures, vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, or similar), and MCP or tool-use frameworks.
...
- Understanding of how AI/ML models consume data and the engineering requirements for reliable, low-latency AI data serving.
...
- Awareness of AI governance considerations:
...
provenance, bias detection, and responsible AI
...
- AI-first mindset — you leverage AI tools in your own workflow and think about how data infrastructure should evolve as AI capabilities advance. We’ll want to see something you built on the side as a passion project.
...
- Databricks, Spark, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog.
...
- Python, SQL, dbt or similar transformation frameworks.
...
- Azure cloud services (ADLS, Azure ML, Synapse) or equivalent.

results.title: Senior Manager, Artificial Intelligence Data Engineer job with Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. | 3058625
highlights:
Senior Manager, Artificial Intelligence Data Engineer job with Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. | 3058625
...
# Senior Manager, Artificial Intelligence Data Engineer
...
Employer Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. Location Tarrytown, New York Start date Jul 2, 2026
...
Global Development is embarking on a Digital Transformation project incorporating AI, machine learning, and automation to help us reduce cycle times, improve quality allowing us to focus on more meaningful work. We focus on developing and improving data pipelines, infrastructure, architecture, and analytic tools to allow resources to fuel our transformation. Working with a team of engineers, analysts, and scientists, you will contribute to modernizing our clinical data infrastructure. This highly visible role will be a technical and strategic liaison between the transformation projects and IT.
...
A key responsibility will be developing and optimizing schema and data models for clinical data. We ensure that those products are standard compliant and interoperable with other platforms and data sources. This role will also contribute to data governance strategy and to the development and management of tools improving and monitoring data quality. The data engineer will also develop processes to automate routine workflows. The engineer will also provide technical leadership and mentorship and will stay current with innovations in data engineering so that they may be evaluated for implementation. This position offers the opportunity to contribute to a fast-growing, science-driven organization making a meaningful difference to patients worldwide.
...
Discover your role: Work with a cross-functional team to optimize and implement our data strategy with a focus on optimization for digital transformation and the use of AI/ML Design and document end-to-end data architectures that support diverse analytic, operational, and research needs. Facilitate the implementation of a modern data platform (e.g. Snowflake, Databricks, etc.) Identify opportunities and implement solutions to increase data interoperability and standardization among systems and across other business units. Develop and implement pipelines to monitor and improve both internal and external (i.e., from CRO partners) data quality. Work with informatics and AI engineers optimizing the utility of data for their respective pipelines. Monitor and optimize the performance of data architectures and platforms. Develop or implement critical metrics to measure the impact of the overall data strategy. Stay up to date with the latest advances in the field and, as appropriate, evaluate them for adoption
...
This role requires:An advanced degree in computer science, statistics, biomedical informatics, or a related field is preferred (PhD + 2 years of experience or an MS + 4 years of relevant experience). A minimum of 5 years experience developing and leading the implementation of data engineering solutions, including accountability for the success of the implementation, in life sciences or healthcare Demonstrated expertise in designing and maintaining infrastructure and architecture for clinical or biomedical data in a healthcare or life sciences setting. Expertise in modern data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery, Databricks) and programming languages such as Python, SQL, R, etc. Maintain and manage code repositories (e.g Bitbucket) ensuring clean, well-documented code with proper version control. Proficiency in cloud architecture (e.g. AWS, Azure, GCP) and DevOps practices. Recognized certifications are a plus. Experience building, scaling, and maintaining pipelines for structured and unstructured data. Ability to integrate pipelines across the enterprise is essential. Deep understanding of regulatory frameworks (HIPAA, GDPR, 21 CFR Part 11) and clinical data standards (CDISC, HL7, FHIR). Knowledge of machine learning pipelines and integration with clinical data platforms. May require travel up to 20%.

results.title: Executive Director Applied AI job with Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. | 3055450
highlights:
Executive Director Applied AI job with Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. | 3055450
...
# Executive Director Applied AI
...
Employer Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. Location Tarrytown, New York Start date Jun 16, 2026
...
Regenerons Enterprise Data & AI organization is newly established and moving fast built to drive AI transformation and adoption at scale across every part of the enterprise. This is a high-visibility, high-velocity position where the work is directly tied to business and scientific impact.
...
As a key member of our AI Technology, Innovation & Delivery team, this role leads Regenerons enterprise applied AI strategy and innovation agenda, accountable for translating frontier AI capabilities into production-grade solutions that advance the companys scientific and business priorities. The Executive Director, Applied AI sets direction across four interconnected domains Agentic AI Strategy and Platform Evaluation, Enterprise AI Product Management, Emerging Technology and Industry Intelligence, and Forward Deployment Engineering and is responsible for moving from opportunity to architecture to deployed solutions. The role works in close partnership with the Data & AI Engineering leader in Regenerons Global Capability Center (GCC) in India, where build and operate resides. Together, they ensure that what is designed is architected for platform-scale delivery and built to last.
...
Sets enterprise direction for agentic AI, evaluating and selecting platforms, frameworks, and architecture patterns. Strategy and platform selection reside in this role; build and operate sit within the GCC.
...
Tracks the AI frontier across models, platforms, agentic frameworks, and methods and translates that intelligence into concrete recommendations tied to Regenerons business and scientific priorities.
...
Maintains a clear view of how AI is advancing across biopharma and life sciences and identifies where emerging capabilities can solve real problems or unlock new opportunities. Runs structured pilots with clear adoption criteria.
...
Leads a team that embeds directly with business and scientific stakeholders to activate AI solutions at speed. Operates in two modes: rapid deployment of configured GenAI and low-code/no-code solutions and structured prototype-to-handoff engagements for higher-complexity problems requiring GCC production engineering.
...
Set the technical and architectural direction for applied AI at Regeneron. Translate business problems into solution blueprints, architecture patterns, and integration pathways. Own design decisions from concept through prototype with the rigor required for production.
...
Lead the agentic AI strategy defining where Regeneron builds, buys, or partners; and ensuring strategic alignment with GCC for build-and-operate execution.
...
Lead the Enterprise AI Product Management function ensuring every enterprise AI capability has a defined roadmap, a business sponsor, and measurable adoption outcomes.
...
Connect emerging technology intelligence to specific business problems and scientific opportunities across all departments. Run disciplined pilots with clear adoption criteria.
...
Bachelor's degree (Master's or advanced degree preferred) with 17+ years leading applied AI/ML organizations through the full lifecycle opportunity identification, architecture, prototype, and production handoff.
...
Deep familiarity with the current AI landscape: generative AI, agentic systems, LLM application architecture, retrieval and reasoning patterns, and modern AI/ML platforms.
...
Hands-on familiarity with low-code/no-code AI deployment and configured GenAI platforms; able to recognize when a business problem calls for rapid configuration versus custom engineering and build a team that executes both modes with equal discipline.

# Senior Manager, Global Development AI Engineer
...

## Job Details
...
Global Development (GD) is embarking on a digital transformation project that will incorporate AI, machine learning, and automation into our processes to help us reduce cycle times, improve quality, and allow us to focus on more meaningful work. This position will play a key role in developing the platforms, processes and technologies that will incorporate AI effectively across GD. The AI engineer will work with a team of engineers and scientists to help bring transformative change to GD. The role will encompass a wide range of AI/ML-related activities, from data engineering and technical development to optimizing vendor systems for use at Regeneron to mentoring colleagues in best practices for adopting and AI in their everyday workflows. Development will not necessarily be limited to the use of generative AI, but may also include technical implementation of machine learning models, natural language processing, and other approaches. The engineer will work with stakeholders across GD and other groups to develop solutions and architectures that addresses our needs and integrate into the overall corporate strategy.

You will work at the intersection of data science, AI innovation, and enterprise technology to deliver intelligent products and capabilities that drive productivity, automation, and enhanced user experiences across the organization. The Sr Staff AI Scientist - Generative AI will apply knowledge and experience to real world problems and seek to utilize their skills reduce the cost of healthcare and improve health quality and outcomes. With access to dedicated on premise and cloud based big data solutions, the team can work with a vast amount of structured and unstructured data including claims, membership, physician demographics, medical records and others to begin to solve some of the most pressing healthcare issues of our time. A Data Scientist at Cotiviti will be given the opportunity to work directly with a team of healthcare professionals including analysts, clinicians, coding specialists, auditors and innovators to set aggressive goals and execute on them with the team. Join arenaflex, and you'll be part of a team that's changing the world one innovation at a time. We are currently seeking a talented and passionate Data Scientist to join our Cloud Technologies Application Platform team and help us build the future of developer experience through cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions.
...
Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
s degree in Data Science
...
, Mathematics, or a
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

- Published research or contributions to open-source machine learning projects

- Experience with prompt engineering and LLM optimization techniques
...
If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.

results.title: Regis A. James
highlights:
Associate Director (Data Science) and Head (Data Science & AI Community of Practice) at [Regeneron](https://
...

pharmaceuticals)
...
Responsibilities: ● Leading a team to further evolve an AI recommendation engine for identifying additional disease indications for therapeutics already within the existing Regeneron armamentarium and another AI recommendation engine for identifying the gene targets pathways most likely to be accessible with Regeneron’s existing therapeutic modalities ● Driving all aspects of business efficiency by building and advising on AI systems that enable impactful, data-driven decisions via generation of recommendations, NLP (natural language processing), flagging / anomaly detection, forecasting, logistics, and interactive conversations powered by RAG (retrieval augmented generation). ● Further building and managing MAGNETRON AI recommendation engine for democratizing institutional expertise, generating hundreds of highly relevant and accepted internal matches between applications from thousands of employees at scale in order to optimize the people, process, and technology of Regeneron. (https://www.youtube.com/@DataDrivenDecisionmaking) ● All Senior Biopharmaceutical Data Science Manager responsibilities. ● Bringing membership of RADS to ~460 colleagues, as of June 2024, and maintained bi-weekly in-depth showcase of how data scientists across Regeneron can maximize ROI by focusing on optimizing KPIs with every collaboration.
...
DADS (Development Data Science & Analytics) Responsibilities: ● Leading a team to build a full-stack cloud recommendation engine AI leveraging the multiomic knowledgegraph I built to investigate new applications for already clinically-approved drugs, which may help drastically reduce time required for treating patients suffering from other diseases. ● Working cross-functionally to improve the quality of clinical trials by leveraging ML/AI (machine learning and artificial intelligence) approaches to perform forensic root cause assessments that help enable the strategic data-driven decisionmaking of key upper-level stakeholders. ● Re-establishing the Posit-based data science cloud platform within the Global Development (GD) sector, replicating its prior success in R&pD to enable impactful data-driven decision-making among clinical trial data scientists and collaborators. ● Raising the standard of data science performed company-wide by assembling my hundreds of computational colleagues from all departments and leading them with the RADS (Regeneron Analysts and Data Scientists) AI and data science community of practice, evolved/expanded from what was formerly RRUG), a forum that I created and regularly host for mentoring/teaching fellow data scientists, networking, exchanging insights, and initiating novel groundbreaking collaborations (membership of ~160 people across the company). (https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7036453713967751169) ● Creating end-to-end MAGNETRON AI system (Mentoring and Growing Next-generation Talent at Regeneron; patent-pending) from scratch, powered by agentic workflows and accelerated with LLM technology, to perform company wide employee matching for institutional knowledge transfer / training / mentoring at scale, processing applications 10-20x faster than the manual rates of previous years, all while maximizing AI explainability and human-in-loop governance. (https://posit.co/about/customer-stories/regeneron)
